person_name: Gaius Scribonius Curio (consul 76 BCE, general and politician of the late Roman Republic)
person_name_full: Gaius Scribonius Curio (consul 76 BCE, general and politician of the late Roman Republic)
notes: Roman general and politician, consul in 76 BCE, known for severe discipline and military leadership in the late Roman Republic.

docs.title: BOOK XXIX
docs.author: Ammianus Marcellinus
docs.excerpt: … in imitation of Curio, that most vigorous and severe general, who by this kind of punishment crushed the ferocity of the Dardanians, when it was reviving like the Lernæan hydra. 23.
